arc_completion.note: Khoa và Phương resolve powerfully — his lie shatters completely, her shift from passive acceptance to genuine choice is earned. But secondary arcs falter. Hai Luyện is built up with ghost/wound/lie/want/need as a significant counterpoint to both Khoa and Cụ Ba, then vanishes after Ch 16 without the outlined resolution (choosing to fade faster). Chị Tư Hồng's promised emotional burst — crying for the first time in fifty years when the text fades — never lands on page. Liên's reckoning with whether her sister reincarnated or ended happens off-stage. Cô Năm Thảo's oil-smell fear plants but never harvests. The thematic questions these characters embody ('Quyền được cứu — hay quyền được buông?', 'Chữ viết thay thế ký ức?') go unexamined in the final act.

pacing_curve.note: Strong three-act structure with well-escalating stakes: Meridian approaching, 48-hour ticking clock, article deadline, Phương fading faster. Quiet chapters (9, 13, 23) are strategically placed as breathers. The Ch 18-24 acceleration toward climax is relentless and earned. However, Ch 12 — the MIDPOINT, the false victory beat — is only 1423 words, making it the shortest chapter in the book. The discoveries here (notebook makes people 'đặc,' island growing when Khoa arrived) deserve far more weight, internal conflict, and sensory detail. This is where creeping dread should crystallize, but the chapter reads like a summary of itself.

theme_coherence.note: Themes are woven into the novel's marrow. Memory-as-prison versus forgetting-as-mercy operates at every level: magic system (exist because remembered, freed when forgotten), character motivation (Khoa's lie, Cụ Ba's law, Phương's acceptance), political conflict (isolation vs. connection), and prose imagery (things disappearing, gardens shrinking, clothes left on beds). The central question — 'Ký ức thuộc về ai — người nhớ hay người được nhớ?' — receives nuanced, unresolved exploration. The one slightly under-integrated thread is the environmental/political dimension (Meridian, oil exploration), which functions more as plot device than thematic parallel.

foreshadowing_resolution.note: Of 20 planted threads, most harvest beautifully: the notebook's life-force ink (Ch 3, 10 → 19), Cụ Ba's knowing sadness and his question about why Khoa could see the island (Ch 8 → 19), gray flowers signaling departure (Ch 1, 5 → 22), Khoa's changing reflection (Ch 2 → 19), the coffee scent vanishing when someone is about to go (Ch 4, 15 → 22). The plant-to-payoff distances are well-calibrated, most spanning 8-15 chapters. Weaker threads: Chị Tư Hồng's unborn child (#16) lacks clear resolution despite two plantings; Luyện's fate is ambiguous; Cô Năm Thảo's oil premonition receives no scene acknowledging she was right.

world_consistency.note: Internal logic holds firm across 24 chapters. Rules established early — only South China Sea drownees arrive, existence tied to specific living memory, one-way magic (hear but cannot respond), forgetting releases or reincarnates — are never contradicted. Khoa's anomalous presence (didn't drown in biển Đông) is justified by the 'nước nhớ anh' reveal and supported by early clues (infant thirst, blood growing flowers, island growing). The life-force handwriting secret, revealed late, is consistent with all prior evidence: his clear ink versus Chị Tư's fading text, his reflection dimming, his hands becoming translucent. No lore contradictions detected.

voice_consistency.note: The voice is remarkable in its steadiness. The specified register — u buồn nhưng không bi lụy, long flowing sentences with falling cadences, salt and smoke vocabulary wells, body-before-emotion — is maintained across all 24 chapters without wavering. Dialogue differentiation holds: islanders speak Nghệ An dialect ('thím,' 'nghen,' 'ruỗi,' body-based emotional expression) while Khoa's speech remains analytical Northern Vietnamese. The prose never tips into melodrama, even at the novel's most painful moments (Phương's departure, the notebook burning). The 'đếm' motif (counting garden rows, counting houses, counting people) threads through consistently as ritual and erosion marker.

overall_engagement.note: A haunting, literary fantasy with genuine emotional weight. The premise is striking and original — an island where the drowned exist only as long as the living remember them specifically. The Khoa-Phương relationship develops with tender patience, making his final choice to burn the notebook and let her go genuinely devastating. The ending's refusal of clean resolution (Phương may have reincarnated or truly ended; the article will publish; the island continues shrinking; Khoa is fading) is brave and thematically appropriate. The Final Image mirroring the Opening Image — from six garden rows to none, from counting twenty houses to eighteen — provides structural satisfaction without emotional comfort. Main dampeners: the underweight midpoint, unresolved secondary arcs, and a middle section (Ch 8-12) that could tighten.

top_suggestion: Two interventions would most strengthen the novel. First, add one scene for Hai Luyện in the Ch 19-22 range showing his ultimate choice. He is the novel's most visible dropped thread — positioned as a thematic counterpoint to both Khoa (active clinging vs. Luyện's desperate action) and Cụ Ba (preservation through stasis vs. preservation through connection), given a full ghost/wound/lie/want/need in planning documents — but after Ch 16 he simply disappears. A brief scene: Luyện watching the notebook burn from a distance, understanding he cannot force anyone to remember him specifically, and choosing his own departure (or refusing it, remaining trapped). This would harvest the thematic question he embodies — 'Quyền được cứu — hay quyền được buông?' — which currently goes unexamined. Second, expand Ch 12 from its current 1423 words to at least 3000. This is the MIDPOINT — the false victory where Khoa discovers his notebook works AND the island grew when he arrived. Both revelations deserve more internal processing, more sensory detail, more of the creeping wrongness that should define this beat. Currently it reads like an outline executed at speed, which underserves the novel's most crucial pivot.
